allow: Bash(node -e "const db=require\('better-sqlite3'\)\('./kri.db'\); const r=db.prepare\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as c FROM kris'\).get\(\); console.log\('KRIs in DB:', r.c\); const s=db.prepare\('SELECT kri_name, valoracion, cmmi_flag, valor_enero FROM kris LIMIT 3'\).all\(\); console.log\(s\);")

Bash(node -e "const db=require\('better-sqlite3'\)\('./kri.db'\); const r=db.prepare\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as c FROM kris'\).get\(\); console.log\('KRIs:', r.c\); const cols=db.prepare\('PRAGMA table_info\(kris\)'\).all\(\).map\(c=>c.name\); console.log\('Columns:', cols.join\(', '\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); console.log\('Functions:', d.length\); const fn=d[0]; console.log\('First fn:', fn.code, 'avgVal:', fn.avgValoracion, 'cats:', fn.categories.length\); const sub=fn.categories[0].subcategories[0]; console.log\('First sub:', sub.code, 'val:', sub.valoracion, 'kri:', sub.kri_name\);")
